case_title: STEPHEN LOBO VS. SIMPLE UNION INTERACTIVE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY LOBO, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPLE UNION INTERACTIVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
